ul.li: Only update slots starting at offset
Re-register entire table on any change After (IORING_REGISTER_FILES_UPDATE):

div.p: Step 3: io_uring_enter c ret = syscall(__NR_io_uring_register, ring_fd, IORING_REGISTER_FILES_UPDATE, &update, 4);

ul.li:
For each slot at offset + i:
If fds[i] == -1: unregister slot
If fds[i] >= 0: resolve fd to struct file *
Returns index of first failed slot + 1

div.p: Success Case c ret == 0 // All slots updated
Partial Failure c ret > 0 // First failed slot + 1 // Check resv[ret-1] for errno
